historicalEquivalence.conclusion: The reported V41 scores 11/18 and 10/18 are not equivalent measurements.

evidence.notes: V41 was promoted over V15 on an 18-case dataset containing three critical cases.
Later candidates used a different sealed hidden set, six critical cases and a different scoring contract. The absent recorded SHA prevents equivalence reconstruction.

rootCause: evaluator/scoring contract changed between experiment families
the later 10/18 record lacks the complete immutable environment identity

canonicalHistoricalResult.rule: Keep 11/18 as the V41 promotion result and 10/18 as a separate later-family result; neither is a Benchmark V2 score.

historicalEquivalence.rule: Scores may be compared only when benchmark version, hidden SHA, system prompt, model and adapter hashes, tokenizer revision, generation settings, scorer revision and effective runtime are identical.

models.conditional: evaluate only through an endpoint that proves the effective model identity
evaluate only through an endpoint that proves the effective model identity

systemPrompt: Responde en español. Resuelve la tarea con precisión; usa evidencia o verificación cuando corresponda y no inventes información ausente.

scoringContract.numeric: a parsed finite number must equal expected within tolerance
scoringContract.python_function: isolated Python -I execution, AST restrictions, complete test fraction and timeout
scoringContract.structured_rubric: deterministic concept coverage and forbidden-claim veto; calibrated judges may be recorded separately but cannot overwrite rule scores
scoringContract.fallbackResponse: reported but ineligible for model attribution or training-gate evidence
